case_title: BIASOTTI, ENRICO vs. BREGENZER, MICHAEL et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: LOWE, DAVID R SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR BIASOTTI, ENRICO
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, MOTION TO CORRECT MISTAKE IN NAME OF PARTY, CALENDAR OF JUN-10-1994, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER NAME CHANGE.
ORDER CORRECTING NAME OF DEFENDANT MICHAEL BERGENZER TO BE MICHAEL BREGENZER
PHOTOCOPY FOR PLAINTIFF BIASOTTI, ENRICO
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT BREGENZER, MICHAEL
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BREGENZER, MICHAEL
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $2,228.00 AS TO DEFENDANT BREGENZER, MICHAEL
TRIAL ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 01
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR

CAUSE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/DAVID LOWE AS COUNSEL. DEF. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIPULATION W/JUDGMENT FOR PL. - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 2038 CARROLL AVE, S.F, CA. - $2,200 RENT & DAMAGES - EVICTION STAYED TO 9-26-93 AT 12NOON - DEF. TO MAKE INSTALLMENTS OF $400 ON 10-1-93 AND $200 ON THE 1ST OF EACH SUCCEEDING MONTH UNTIL FULL $2,200 IS PD - DEF. WILL HAVE A 3DAY GRACE PERIOD FOR PMT. - IF ANY PMT. IS LATE, THE UNPAID BALANCE BECOMES DUE UPON EXPARTE APPLICATION TO THE COURT - IF ALL PMTS. ARE TIMELY & FULL AMOUNT PD BY 7-1-94, PL. WILL S/A JUDGMENT & DISM. THIS ACTION. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,
THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BREGENZER, MICHAEL $2,200.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,200.00
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR JUDGMT, REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF BIASOTTI, ENRICO
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BREGENZER, MICHAEL
MOTION TO CORRECT MISTAKE IN NAME OF PARTY, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF BIASOTTI, ENRICO HEARING SET FOR JUN-10-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 06
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BIASOTTI, ENRICO AS TO DEFENDANT BREGENZER, MICHAEL DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT BREGENZER, MICHAEL
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BIASOTTI, ENRICO COURT TRIAL SET FOR AUG-19-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
